title: Rental Deposit Assistance * Native American Community * Homelessness Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rental Deposit Assistance * Native American Community * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Laborers AIDS/HIV Families with Children Foster Children Homeless Veterans Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Native American Community * Homelessness Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Slavic Community Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NCH'I WANA HOUSING HOUSING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with application fees, security deposits, move-in costs, and transitional housing in order to help individuals overcome barriers to establishing permanent housing. 2025 W 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children who identify as Native American and are experiencing homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 436-3810 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NCH'I WANA HOUSING HOUSING ASSISTANCE
